name: sentry
description: Sentry plugin for AI coding assistants with MCP, commands, and skills for setup, debugging, and monitoring workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Set up Sentry, debug production issues, and query Sentry from Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Sentry skills and the Sentry MCP server to add Sentry to projects, inspect and fix production issues, review code with Sentry context, create alerts, and configure monitoring workflows.
defaultPrompt: Create a Slack alert for high-priority issues
